mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_type, t.task_status, t.target_level, t.indicator_id, coalesce(i.indicator_name, t.indicator_name) as indicator_name, t.data_targets, t.source_type, t.fill_cycle, t.schedule_mode, t.cron_expression, t.audit_enabled, t.owner_name, t.data_count, t.last_run_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from nc_fusion_collection_task t left join nc_fusion_indicator i on i.indicator_id = t.indicator_id
mapper.insert: insert into nc_fusion_collection_task (task_name, task_type, task_status, target_level, indicator_id, indicator_name, data_targets, source_type, fill_cycle, schedule_mode, cron_expression, audit_enabled, owner_name, data_count, last_run_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{taskStatus}, #{targetLevel}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{dataTargets}, #{sourceType}, #{fillCycle}, #{scheduleMode}, #{cronExpression}, #{auditEnabled}, #{ownerName}, #{dataCount}, #{lastRunTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select task_status as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_fusion_collection_task where del_flag = '0' group by task_status order by task_status
select task_type as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_fusion_collection_task where del_flag = '0' group by task_type order by task_type
